title: Chili Oil
ingredients: 500g white fish fillets (cod, seabass, or tilapia)
steps: Pat fish dry and season with salt, pepper, and Shaoxing wine.
Pan-fry fish until golden and crisp on both sides. Set aside.
Heat oil in wok and fry dried chilies and Szechuan peppercorns briefly.
Add garlic and ginger and sauté until fragrant.
Add soy sauce, vinegar, sugar, and stock. Bring to simmer.
Add slurry if thicker sauce is needed.
Pour sauce over fish and garnish with cilantro or sesame seeds.
chefTips: Keep fish dry for crisp texture.
Balance spice with sugar and vinegar.
